nodes.label: sanad-review-setup.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad app's Student View showing the Smart Review (المراجعة الذكية) panel. The panel allows law students to choose a review mode (Flashcards or Quiz), select a source (All, Terms Bank, Cases Bank, or Lectures), and filter by subject or classification before starting an AI-powered review session. The top navigation includes tabs for Student Morning, Study Materials, Academic Deadlines, Terms Bank (16 items), Cases Bank (6 items), and Smart Review. A role switcher toggles between Student and Lawyer modes. The app footer identifies it as a PWA for Saudi lawyers and small businesses.

nodes.label: Smart Review Feature
nodes.description: AI-powered self-review system for law students. Generates flashcards and quizzes from the student's own terms, cases, and lecture notes. Supports subject and classification filtering.

nodes.label: Flashcard Review Mode
nodes.description: Review mode where students flip cards to reveal answers. Designed for memorization of legal terms and case details.

nodes.label: Quiz Review Mode
nodes.description: Review mode using multiple-choice or true/false questions for self-testing. Complements flashcard mode for active recall.

nodes.label: Student Role (طالب)
nodes.description: One of two user roles in Sanad (alongside Lawyer/محامي). The Student role provides academic tools: study materials, deadlines, terms bank, cases bank, and smart review. A role switcher in the top bar toggles between Student and Lawyer modes.

nodes.label: Terms Bank (بنك المصطلحات)
nodes.description: Student-facing repository of legal terminology. Shown with a badge of 16 items. Serves as a source for smart review sessions.

nodes.label: Cases Bank - Student (بنك القضايا)
nodes.description: Student-facing repository of legal cases used for study. Shown with a badge of 6 items. Serves as a source for smart review sessions alongside terms and lectures.
